chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. B.A. No. S- 418 of 2016 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.01.2018 For orders on office objection For hearing Mr. Imamuddin Otho, advocate for applicant Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, D.P.G. Learned counsel for the applicant states that under the instructions from his client he does not wish to press this bail application any further. Accordingly the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
